raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024 XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX submitted an auto-pay of {$290.00}. I contacted the XXXX XXXX XXXX asking for a refund and to no longer charge my credit card. I received no reply to my request so on XXXX XXXX, XXXX  I disputed the charge with Citi Cards. Case ID XXXX Reason for Dispute-Unrecognized charge- Card ending in - XXXX It was determined on XX/XX/2024 that I was responsible for the charges. I immediately emailed Card Services and stated : " Simply because the vendor issued Citi Bank a few pages of their policy doesn't mean that I authorized the charge, which I did NOT! The charge was a total surprise to me in as much how they made my " one time '' purchase a yearly autopay. It was NOT made clear to me thus making it fraudulent. Why Citi took their side is very disappointing considering I couldn't find an authorization in the vendor 's paperwork giving them the right to charge me, yet Citi Card approved the charge anyway. What the vendor and Citi Card did was wrong. Is the same injustice going to happen again this time next year? '' I waited over two months for a reply from Citi-Cards and have yet to receive an answer, thus the reason for this complaint.
